name: 3D Jigsaw Puzzle Simulator
short_description: A demo game about assembling puzzles in 3D space. You can load any picture for assembly from your computer and select any level from the pause menu.
detailed_description:
With this demo of the game, you can plunge into the world of jigsaw puzzles assembly as in real life to classical music on a nice looking levels.

The game has:
- Upload your own picture for assembly
- 3 levels to build
- Assembly timer
- Hints: flip all pieces and find adjacent pieces
- Control with keyboard and mouse
- Educational level
- Hiding and showing the interface
- Manipulation of puzzle pieces on any surface
